receipts.signal: People repeatedly ask what to do after reaching the empty state.
receipts.interpretation: The next action is not clear enough.
receipts.counter_signal: Some questions may come from missing setup prerequisites rather than copy.

receipts.signal: Several new users pause before selecting the first setup action.
receipts.interpretation: The action hierarchy or language may be unclear.
receipts.decision_impact: Supports measuring first-action completion after a copy change.
receipts.counter_signal: The replay sample may overrepresent unsuccessful sessions.

coverage_gaps: No segmented completion baseline is available.
